description_long: This is a sculpted bust of a bearded male figure, likely representing a mythological or historical character, with deeply carved, flowing hair and a prominent, solemn face. The sculpture is rendered in a weathered stone material, with intricate details in the hair, beard, and facial features, giving it a lifelike and expressive appearance. The head is adorned with a band or diadem, and the base features decorative floral motifs in relief. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, showing the rougher, unfinished stone and some visible markings or inscriptions. The overall form is blocky, with the head and shoulders emerging from a rectangular base. The surface shows signs of age and patina, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or handled over time.
description: A weathered stone bust of a bearded male figure with detailed hair and facial features, set on a rectangular base with floral reliefs. The sculpture has a solemn expression and a band across the head.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the rough, unfinished stone and visible markings or inscriptions along the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flowing hair, the band across the head, and the floral relief on the base.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the expressive face, detailed beard, and symmetrical hair, with the full bust visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the hair, band, and floral relief, but with slightly different shadowing and wear.
attribute_subject_matter: bearded male bust, possibly mythological or historical figure
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is neutral and does not indicate a particular setting.
